title: 🎯 Create New Mission
description: Define a new mission with objectives, timeline, and resource requirements

fields.name: mission_name
fields.label: 📝 Mission Name
fields.help: Enter a descriptive mission name (3-50 characters)

fields.name: mission_type
fields.label: 🏷️ Mission Type
fields.help: Select the primary category for this mission

fields.name: priority_level
fields.label: ⚡ Priority Level
fields.help: Set the urgency and importance level for this mission

fields.name: description
fields.label: 📋 Mission Description
fields.help: Provide a detailed description of the mission objectives and scope
fields.default: Mission objective and requirements to be defined...

fields.name: estimated_duration
fields.label: ⏱️ Estimated Duration
fields.help: Estimate how long this mission will take to complete

fields.name: start_date
fields.label: 📅 Start Date
fields.help: When should this mission begin? (YYYY-MM-DD format)

fields.name: target_completion
fields.label: 🎯 Target Completion Date
fields.help: Set a target completion date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

fields.name: required_skills
fields.label: 🛠️ Required Skills
fields.help: Select skills required for this mission (multiple selections allowed)

fields.name: resources_needed
fields.label: 📦 Resources Needed
fields.help: Select resources needed for this mission (multiple selections allowed)

fields.name: success_criteria
fields.label: ✅ Success Criteria
fields.help: Define measurable criteria that indicate mission completion
fields.default: Mission completed successfully with all objectives met and documented.

fields.name: companion_assistance
fields.label: 🤖 Companion Assistance
fields.help: Level of AI companion assistance needed for this mission

fields.name: auto_track_progress
fields.label: 📊 Auto-track Progress
fields.help: Automatically track and log mission progress
